## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review and refine content opportunities for Smith.ai's SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on tactical, SMB owner-oriented content that drives conversions, not just traffic](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Prioritize AI receptionist and automation topics, avoiding broad or consumer-focused keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Refresh existing high-potential content and landing pages to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Develop calculators and interactive tools to capture leads and demonstrate value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift focus from broad topics to specific, tactical content for SMB owners](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Avoid consumer-oriented keywords (e.g., "how to block spam on iPhone")](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Target keywords with 200+ monthly searches, but consider emerging trends](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Prioritize content that helps demand-gen manager run effective ads](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

### AI Receptionist Opportunities

  - [Significant potential identified in AI receptionist-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Plan to incorporate AI terminology into existing content to improve search engine understanding](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Develop content around "7 productive ways to use AI for lawyers" and similar targeted topics](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2901.0)

### Content Refresh Workflow

  - [Identify existing pages ranking on 2nd page or lower for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2757.0)
  - [Extend blogs with new information, internal links, and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [Enrich industry-specific landing pages (e.g., answering service for realtors)](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
  - [Use AI to analyze competitor content gaps and inform expansions](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2854.0)

### Lead Capture and Conversion Optimization

  - [Develop calculators to demonstrate virtual receptionist value (e.g., cost savings)](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Create single-page calculator experiences optimized for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Improve CTAs on blog posts to guide users to next steps (e.g., "Calculate your savings")](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)
  - [Focus on motivating SMB owners to prioritize virtual receptionist adoption](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Reviewed competitors listed in shared document](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [Identified unique keyword opportunities not currently targeted by Smith.ai](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to refine keyword list, removing irrelevant topics and focusing on high-potential opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=2984.0)
  - [Maddy to review updated keyword clusters and refresh page suggestions, providing feedback](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=3030.0)
  - [Select 2 test articles to begin content creation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=3110.0)
  - [Develop plan for refreshing existing content and landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=3117.0)
  - [Explore calculator and interactive tool development for lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=3418.0)
  - [Weekly follow-up call scheduled for Wednesdays to track progress](https://fathom.video/share/YGWJ_HTsh4TW4ty2kSumbzgMYgHVpQWA?tab=summary&timestamp=3155.0)
